#  [Apache Flink 1.1.2 Released](</2016/09/05/apache-flink-1.1.2-released/>)

September 5, 2016 -

The Apache Flink community released another bugfix version of the Apache Flink 1.1. series.

We recommend all users to upgrade to Flink 1.1.2.


    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-java</artifactId>
      <version>1.1.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-streaming-java_2.10</artifactId>
      <version>1.1.2</version>
    </dependency>
    <dependency>
      <groupId>org.apache.flink</groupId>
      <artifactId>flink-clients_2.10</artifactId>
      <version>1.1.2</version>
    </dependency>


You can find the binaries on the updated [Downloads page](<http://flink.apache.org/downloads.html>).

## Release Notes - Flink - Version 1.1.2

  * [[FLINK-4236](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4236>)] - Flink Dashboard stops showing list of uploaded jars if main method cannot be looked up
  * [[FLINK-4309](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4309>)] - Potential null pointer dereference in DelegatingConfiguration#keySet()
  * [[FLINK-4334](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4334>)] - Shaded Hadoop1 jar not fully excluded in Quickstart
  * [[FLINK-4341](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4341>)] - Kinesis connector does not emit maximum watermark properly
  * [[FLINK-4402](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4402>)] - Wrong metrics parameter names in documentation
  * [[FLINK-4409](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4409>)] - class conflict between jsr305-1.3.9.jar and flink-shaded-hadoop2-1.1.1.jar
  * [[FLINK-4411](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4411>)] - [py] Chained dual input children are not properly propagated
  * [[FLINK-4412](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4412>)] - [py] Chaining does not properly handle broadcast variables
  * [[FLINK-4425](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4425>)] - "Out Of Memory" during savepoint deserialization
  * [[FLINK-4454](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4454>)] - Lookups for JobManager address in config
  * [[FLINK-4480](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4480>)] - Incorrect link to elastic.co in documentation
  * [[FLINK-4486](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4486>)] - JobManager not fully running when yarn-session.sh finishes
  * [[FLINK-4488](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4488>)] - Prevent cluster shutdown after job execution for non-detached jobs
  * [[FLINK-4514](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4514>)] - ExpiredIteratorException in Kinesis Consumer on long catch-ups to head of stream
  * [[FLINK-4526](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4526>)] - ApplicationClient: remove redundant proxy messages
  * [[FLINK-3866](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-3866>)] - StringArraySerializer claims type is immutable; shouldn't
  * [[FLINK-3899](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-3899>)] - Document window processing with Reduce/FoldFunction + WindowFunction
  * [[FLINK-4302](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4302>)] - Add JavaDocs to MetricConfig
  * [[FLINK-4495](<https://issues.apache.org/jira/browse/FLINK-4495>)] - Running multiple jobs on yarn (without yarn-session)

[Want to contribute translation?](<https://cwiki.apache.org/confluence/display/FLINK/Flink+Translation+Specifications>)
